variants.notes: Preview shows user color(); Render shows CGAL engine colors (yellow=positive, green=subtracted). Preview hex #39bdb0 differs from exact CSS Turquoise #40E0D0 due to OpenSCAD 2021.01 lighting/shading applied to the user-assigned color.
Preview shows user color(); Render shows CGAL engine colors (yellow=positive, green=subtracted). SCAD color() call for this variant not yet confirmed from source.
Preview shows user color(); Render shows CGAL engine colors. This scenario produces 2D geometry (projection) for SVG/DXF export. SCAD color() call for this variant not yet confirmed from source.
